title: What happened after 2k people tried to hack my AI assistant
content: Article URL: https://www.fernandoi.cl/posts/hackmyclaw/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48681687 Points: 363 # Comments: 160

highlights: 2k people tried to hack my AI assistant

title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
summary: 本文探讨了混合模型在预测不同token时的表现差异，分析了哪些类型的token在混合模型中预测效果更好，并提供了相关实验数据和见解。
highlights: 混合模型在特定token上表现出更优的预测能力
实验数据揭示了token类型与预测准确性的关联
为优化混合模型提供了有价值的参考
